name: BidmadPremiumAdsGoogleAdapter
summary: Integrated App Monetization Solution for Mobile Apps by all Publishers
description: BidmadSDK privacy-manifest carrier for PremiumAdsGoogleAdapter. Ships the PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy added in PremiumAdsGoogleAdapter 1.0.8 while pinning the 1.0.6 binary, which does not statically embed the full Google-Mobile-Ads-SDK.
